# Koen Claes

Product Designer, UX Designer, Business Analyst and Proxy Product Owner.

Koen Claes helps teams design complex operational software.

His work focuses on helping teams understand complicated domains, align stakeholders and create software that supports real users in performing meaningful work.

While much of his recent work has been in Air Traffic Management, similar challenges have been addressed in healthcare, industrial automation, defense, infrastructure and other specialized domains.

## Areas of Expertise

* Complex operational systems
* Air Traffic Management (ATM)
* Enterprise software
* User research
* Requirements engineering
* Product discovery
* Design systems
* Information architecture
* UX for information-dense interfaces
* AI-assisted product development

## Experience

17+ years designing and improving digital products.

## More Information

* https://www.azertyuiop.be/llms-full.txt
